h1: Cancellation terms — refund percentages and deadlines at ArdenNest
pageSubtitle: Our cancellation policy is designed to protect both guests and hosts. Please read the terms and conditions for cancelling your booking below.
intro: At ArdenNest, we understand that plans can change. That's why we maintain a fair and transparent cancellation policy. Below you will find the terms that apply to your booking.

tiers.description: If you cancel more than 60 days before the scheduled arrival date, you will receive a full refund minus €50 administration costs.
If you cancel between 30 and 60 days before arrival, 50% of the total booking amount will be refunded.
If you cancel between 14 and 30 days before arrival, 25% of the total booking amount will be refunded.
If you cancel less than 14 days before the scheduled arrival date, no refund is possible.

conditions: All cancellations must be submitted in writing via email.
The date of receipt of the cancellation is the cancellation date.
In case of early departure during your stay, no refund will be given.
The security deposit will be refunded within 14 days after departure, provided there is no damage.
We recommend taking out cancellation insurance.
In case of no-show (not showing up), the full amount will be charged.

forceMajeure.title: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content: In case of force majeure (natural disasters, pandemics, government measures making travel impossible), we will work with you to find a suitable solution. This may include: rescheduling the booking to another date or a full refund. ArdenNest reserves the right to decide on a case-by-case basis.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.content: Do you have questions about our cancellation policy or would you like to cancel your booking? Please contact us:

signature: ArdenNest — Your home in the Ardennes
